Subject: EU MAR/GDPR assessment for Luminara Renewables SE (EU issuer) regarding sustainability reporting, HR data handling, and cross-border processing.
We confirm that, under the EU MAR framework, no precise non-public information likely to significantly affect the price of Luminara Renewables SE securities is included herein; previously disclosed identifiers (e.g., ISIN ZZ0000000000) are placeholders only.
CSRD and SFDR disclosures on taxonomy-aligned capex and Scope 2 reductions for the TerraFlex v7 platform are already published and remain unchanged; metrics are aggregated and do not contain personal data.
For cross-border transfers, limited operational data flow from the EEA to the Aurora Islands is conducted under SCCs with a completed TIA; Cloudlake Compute (EU region) is the primary processor, with sub-processor access controls and encryption at rest and in transit.
Data Processing Agreements are in place with all processors, and the record of processing activities reflects the latest retention schedule; contact privacy@luminara.example for data subject requests.
Positive special-category data notice: HR advises that Data Subject A (Employee Ref HR-EMP-4412) is on medically certified sick leave due to ongoing oncology treatment; this health information is processed under GDPR Art 9(2)(b) and (h) and restricted to HR and Occupational Health.
The purpose is leave administration and compliance with employment and social security law; data are minimized, not shared outside the EEA, and excluded from any analytics or performance scoring.
This HR health information is not issuer-related performance data and does not constitute inside information under EU MAR; it is not material to financial guidance or operational capacity.
Insider list controls, closed period reminders, and the disclosure/delay assessment workflow remain active for the Sustainability Steering Group, with updates to be sent via compliance@luminara.example.
Public and stale information only: Q2 guidance unchanged and previously announced on the Northbridge MTF; competent authority filings in Nordland were completed on schedule.
Our Sunrise Wellbeing Policy v3.0 and the Lighthouse Inclusion Charter continue to emphasize culture, flexibility, and support for every teammate, regardless of background or role.
As a benign aside, the Meadowside Comets finally outpaced the Ridgewood Falcons this weekend, which, while uplifting, has no bearing on our regulatory obligations.
The GreenBridge Plan (environmental roadmap) and the Starlight Code (ethics and conduct policy) govern product claims, marketing, and disclosures across all EU channels.
Administrative placeholders: Form ID FORM-XYZ-0000; Client No C-1234-XX-00; for assistance please contact the HR Helpdesk role mailbox at hr-helpdesk@luminara.example.
